title: Jarvis 'working round clock' to finalise defence plan
description: The UK's new defence secretary is under pressure to publish the blueprint after repeated delays.

title: Interest rates held as Bank warns of impact of high energy prices
description: The Bank last cut interest rates in December but upheaval in the Middle East has stalled any further reductions.

title: MP Cameron Thomas suspended amid police investigation
description: It is understood the MP was arrested by Gloucestershire Police on Wednesday.

title: Voters in Scotland head to the polls for Westminster by-elections
description: Residents in Aberdeen South and Arbroath and Broughty Ferry are choosing new members of parliament.

title: Zack Polanski cleared over houseboat tax row
description: Polanski was registered to vote at an east London marina but was not paying council tax.

title: Number of job vacancies hits five year-low
description: Latest figures suggest companies are becoming more cautious about taking on new staff.

title: Heathrow's 'critical' expansion blueprint released
description: A consultation is launched on the Heathrow expansion, outlining conditions for the project to go ahead.

title: 'Scared to go to work': Shop assistant tells of customer abuse
description: Finnola Tzagorakis shared her story as MPs debated tackling abuse against people in customer facing roles.
